summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bulk Import Products feature (CSV/Excel). All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing passed on both Desktop (1920px) and Mobile (390px) viewports. The 4-step import modal works correctly: file selection with drag-drop, preview table, processing, and result display.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI flows verified on Desktop and Mobile)

seed_data_creation: Test products created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Import Products feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/products/import-template (returns CSV template), POST /api/products/import-bulk (multipart/form-data, requires auth). Frontend: ImportProductsModal component with 4 steps (select file, preview, processing, result). Modal accessible via 'Importar' button in Config. Productos → Productos subtab. Existing categories: HAMBURGUESA, CERVEZAS.

backend.GET /api/products/import-template: PASS - Returns CSV with correct columns (nombre, precio, categoria, descripcion, codigo_barras, disponible)
backend.POST /api/products/import-bulk creates p: PASS - Creates products from valid CSV, returns summary with created/skipped/errors
backend.Import handles invalid prices: PASS - Reports errors for non-numeric/negative prices
backend.Import handles empty names: PASS - Reports errors for empty product names
backend.Import handles non-existent categories: PASS - Reports errors for unknown categories
backend.Import skips duplicates: PASS - Skips products with same name+category
backend.Import returns preview: PASS - Returns preview of first 5 rows
backend.Import respects max 2000 rows: PASS - Returns 400 for files with > 2000 rows

frontend_desktop.Import button visible: PASS - Button visible in Config. Productos → Productos subtab
frontend_desktop.Modal opens with drag-drop zone: PASS - Shows 'Arrastra un archivo aqui' with upload icon
frontend_desktop.File selection works: PASS - File input accepts CSV files
frontend_desktop.Preview table shows first 5 rows: PASS - Table with Nombre, Precio, Categoria columns

frontend_mobile.Import button visible (390px): PASS - Button visible in mobile layout
frontend_mobile.Modal opens correctly: PASS - Modal adapts to mobile viewport
frontend_mobile.Drag-drop zone works: PASS - File selection works on mobile
frontend_mobile.Preview table displays: PASS - Table shows correctly on mobile
